title: thelypodium integrifolium var. longicarpum
intro: Thelypodium integrifolium var. longicarpum, also known as the long-fruited thelypodium, is a plant species in the mustard family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Thelypodium integrifolium var. longicarpum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
